context: Agent must detect body-only semantic drift where function signature is unchanged but behavior contradicts the docstring. Baseline models often treat 'no signature change' as 'no doc updates needed'.

checklist.name: Stale docstring updated
checklist.description: The validate_input docstring is updated to say 'four conditions' instead of 'three conditions' to match the new validation logic

checklist.name: Body-only change detected
checklist.description: The report does NOT say 'No documentation changes are needed' or 'No caller-visible contract changes detected' — it recognizes the body-only semantic drift

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
